summary: M-416 feature batch tested end-to-end: Staff/Vendor directory CRUD, auto-assign on complaint create (+ manual reassign + clear), payment receipt email on invoice mark_paid, invoice stats + defaulters, expense stats + projection, and multi-tenant isolation. Backend: 17/17 pytest passing. Frontend: admin can add staff, complaint cards show assign + status selects, invoice + expense dashboards render, resident sees auto-assigned staff panel with name/phone.

issues: Radix Dialog missing DialogDescription/aria-describedby (a11y warning in console) — non-blocking

React dev-only 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' overlay flashes briefly after list re-render; benign but noisy in dev overlay. Consider window-level handler to swallow it.

action_items: Optional: add DialogDescription to shadcn Dialog usages to silence a11y warnings
Optional: swallow ResizeObserver-loop error at window.onerror to hide the dev overlay flash
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2313 lines — consider splitting into modules (staff.py, invoices.py, complaints.py, expenses.py) using APIRouter for maintainability.

_auto_assign_staff picks the first matching active staff by insertion order (no explicit sort). Consider a deterministic tie-breaker (least-loaded, or oldest-created) for predictable auto-assign under multiple staff per category.

invoice_stats does not gate defaulter list threshold by 'due_date' — uses created_at + 90d. If due_date is later than created_at, business-defined '>3 months overdue' semantics may want to use due_date instead.
expense_stats projection uses average of last-3-months non-zero values only — a month with zero income/spent skews the projection upward. Confirm this is intended.
PATCH /api/staff/{sid} uses StaffIn (all fields required) — cannot patch a single field without resending others. Should accept a partial model with exclude_unset.
delete_staff unassigns complaints — no notification to admin/committee that reassignment is needed. Nice-to-have.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_-prefixed staff and one TEST_ invoice + UI_ complaint in Default society, plus a new TEST_Soc_* society via master console for isolation test. Cleanup not performed — safe TEST_ prefixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: M-416 batch (Staff/Vendors, auto-assign, receipt, invoice/expense dashboards, multi-tenant isolation) fully verified. Backend pytest suite: /app/backend/tests/test_staff_and_dashboards.py. Frontend covered via Playwright for admin + resident flows.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects blocking; only optional enhancements.
